name: Voidbreak
title: Voidbreak | Weekly Arcade - Asteroid Roguelite
description: Play Voidbreak free online. Smash asteroids, upgrade your ship, go deeper. Modern Asteroids roguelite with upgrades and leaderboards. No download required.
keywords: voidbreak, asteroids game, roguelite, arcade game, space shooter, browser game, free game
tips: Prioritize movement upgrades early — dodging matters more than damage in the first few waves
Small asteroids are faster but give less XP — focus on medium-sized ones for efficient clearing
Save your special ability for dense asteroid clusters rather than single targets
Keep moving in wide circles to avoid getting cornered by asteroid spawns
Shield upgrades are underrated — they give you breathing room for risky plays
howToPlay: Steer your ship with arrow keys or touch controls to dodge and shoot asteroids. Collect upgrade tokens to improve weapons, speed, or shields. Each wave gets harder. Survive as long as possible and go deeper into the void.
